creator: rodrigo.freebsd@minasambiente.com.br
text:
It makes sense this PR be closed also by "Closed Overcome By Events"?

The new(correct) way to load driver is explained in drm-fbsd13-kmod PKG message.
It's also explained in the wiki page (https://wiki.freebsd.org/Graphics)
Handbook needs to be updated for this subject "5.4.5. Video Cards" (https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/x11/#x-config)
